'''Hosrel XI''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Hosrel system/Legends|Hosrel system]] of the [[Centrality/Legends|Centrality]], located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. The planet was an almost barren rock.

==History==
The few lifeforms that did exist on Hosrel XI's harsh surface were by far considered some of the most savage creatures in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

It was the site of a top-secret [[Centrality Navy]] research base, where [[shield camouflage]] was developed.
After escaping the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] blockade of the [[ThonBoka]], [[Lehesu]] visited Hosrel XI, looking for help. In response, [[Hosrel Perimeter Control]] issued code [[666]], signalling [[Yellow Nine Squadron]] to investigate the intruder. The Centran fighters fired on Lehesu, to his surprise and dismay.

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The PC game [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] spells the planet "Hozrel XI." Additionally, the game mistakenly places the planet in the [[Moddell sector/Legends|Moddell sector]].
